title: 5 Laggards For The Week Ending May 27, 2022
text: U.S. equities recovered some ground in the week ending Friday, May 27, 2022. Positive commentary from JPM at the start of the week kicked off a rally that was led by the Financials sector.

title: These 4 REITs are a Retiree's Best Friend
text: Income now and more growth to come mark these friends with dividends.

title: Essex Property Trust Publishes 2021 Corporate Social Responsibility Report
text: SAN MATEO, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Essex Property Trust, Inc. (NYSE:ESS) announces the publication of its 2021 Corporate Social Responsibility (CSR) Report, summarizing the Company's ongoing progress and accomplishments in Environmental, Social, and Governance (“ESG”) through 2021. “As a prominent provider of housing on the West Coast we recognize the important role we play in leading ESG initiatives forward, both within our Company and the industry as a whole. title: 8 Dividend Aristocrat Leaders to Buy Now With the Stock Market Ready to Blow Up
text: The writing is on the wall, and veteran investors know it. Any time you have an almost a 1,000 point move in the venerable Dow Jones industrial average and give it all back the next day like we did late last week, it indicates that fund managers are selling every uptick, and savvy hedge fund portfolio managers are trying to clear as much margin debt as possible.
